Task Description: Finalized the CaratSense Discovery Questionnaire. Conducted detailed analysis of client operational requirements, textile inventory categories, supplier data structures, and initial scope definition for the Surplus Stock platform.

Drafted comprehensive 10-day agile roadmap. Set up initial project scaffold using Vite+React. Evaluated and mapped out transition to the new tech stack using Supabase for backend replacing traditional database setup for faster iteration.
Designed and deployed initial Supabase relational schemas for Users, Inventory Items, and Surplus Stock matching. Configured Supabase Auth (Email/Password) and tested connection from frontend client.
Implemented core API routing for the ERP system. Set up protected routes using context providers and JWT tokens. Created foundational Dashboard layouts and navigation sidebar.
Built the bulk stock update functionality using batch API requests. Integrated PDF invoice generation modules logic to allow downloading structured records for surplus items.
Started structural UI overhaul. Developed initial 'Neo-Brutalist' design components focusing on high contrast, industrial aesthetics, and flat modular cards.
Refactored core global CSS architecture. Updated table components, input forms, and navigation menus to conform to the new design system. Consolidated utility classes into reusable modules.

Major design pivot to a premium 'Luxury Bento' aesthetic. Applied warm light-gray backgrounds, pitch-black floating cards, and gold (#F5A623) accents. Added 2rem rounded corners and subtle drop shadows across all major dashboard panels.

Bridged the marketing landing page with the core ERP application. Ensured all Call-To-Action (CTA) buttons seamlessly direct authenticated users straight to the live platform. Conducted end-to-end user journey tests.
Performed weekend source-code sanitization. Optimized React state management (removed redundant re-renders), cleaned up unused console logs, and verified component tree rendering performance.
Tested bulk data import flows using mock CSV files. Fixed multiple edge-cases identified during surplus stock filtering mechanisms and inventory pagination.
Resolved deep local environment configuration issues (Vite dev server port conflict between 5173 and 3000). Synced progress and executed roadmap status review to calibrate with deployment goals.
Conducted rigorous review of ERP entry forms under the new 'Luxury Bento' UI constraints. Verified that form inputs, dropdowns, and modals align visually and functionally on main dashboard views.
Tuned responsive breakpoints (CSS media queries) across mobile and tablet views. Fixed overlapping elements on the floating navigation bar and polished interactive hover micro-animations.

Performed complete project readiness audit against original client PDF requirements. Validated that all core functionalities (auth, dashboard, stock insertion, billing logic) are functioning smoothly under load.
Patched final integration bugs found between the landing page routing sequence and the authenticated user dashboard. Ensured secure route handling for unauthenticated fallbacks.
Compiled detailed project daily progress log. Finalized code-comments, prepped build folder ('npm run build'), and staged environments for production deployment.
